summary: Completed testing of Historical Performance feature for Investments. Backend API returns historical_performance data correctly with 30-year price analysis. Frontend displays Historical Performance section in expanded investment cards with all metrics (CAGR values, Max Drawdown, Volatility, Win/Loss Years, vs ATH, Best/Worst years) and color-coded values.
passed_tests: Access gate login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 - SUCCESS
Investment cards load with data (1096 stocks analyzed) - SUCCESS
Expand investment card to see detailed analysis - SUCCESS
Historical Performance section appears with data-testid='historical-performance' - SUCCESS
CAGR values (1Y, 3Y, 5Y, 10Y, 20Y) displayed with color coding - SUCCESS
Max Drawdown metric visible with recovery time - SUCCESS
vs ATH metric visible with 200 SMA trend - SUCCESS
Best/Worst year info shown at bottom - SUCCESS
Backend /api/investments/scan returns signals with historical_performance field - SUCCESS
AAPL has 29 years of historical data with 10Y CAGR of 25.1% - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: Historical Performance feature fully implemented and working
fmp_historical_30yr() correctly fetches data in two chunks (~20yr + ~10yr) to bypass FMP's 5000-item limit
_compute_historical_performance() calculates all metrics correctly: CAGR (1yr/3yr/5yr/10yr/20yr/30yr), max drawdown, recovery time, volatility, best/worst years, win/loss years, vs ATH, 200 SMA trend
Frontend Investments.jsx correctly renders Historical Performance section with data-testid='historical-performance'
Color coding implemented: green for positive CAGR (>=15%), blue for moderate (>=8%), white for low positive, red for negative
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: ~100 stocks have fresh 30yr historical data from investment refresh
context_for_next_testing_agent: Historical Performance feature fully tested and working. Backend returns historical_performance field with years_of_data, CAGR values (1Y-30Y), max_drawdown_pct, recovery_months, annualized_volatility, positive_years, negative_years, best_year, worst_year, current_vs_ath_pct, sma_200_trend, and historical_rating. Frontend displays all metrics in expanded investment cards with proper color coding. AAPL shows 29yr data with 10Y CAGR of 25.1% as expected.
